writing.task1: Dear Conference Organizer I am writing to explain that my visa appointment for the conference has been delayed, and because of this I may not be able to complete the early-bird payment before the deadline. I kindly ask if you could grant me a temporary extension or consider a fee waiver until my visa is confirmed. I have attached proof of for your reference. Could you please provide me with written confirmation regarding this request? Thank you very much for your understanding and support
writing.task2: I agree that financial literacy should be a compulsory subject in upper-secondary schools because it prepares students for real-life responsibilities. Many young people graduate without knowing how to manage money, budget, or avoid debt, which can lead to serious financial problems later. For example, a student who understands interest rates and credit cards is less likely to overspend and fall into long-term debt. Teaching financial literacy early ensures that students are better equipped to make smart financial choices when they start working or studying at university
writing.task3: For a 12-km trip, the car is the fastest (28 minutes) but also the most expensive ($3.80) and it makes the most pollution (2.6 kg CO₂). The bus is the cheapest to use ($1.20) and cleaner (0.7 kg CO₂), but it is the slowest (35 minutes). The e-bike is almost as quick as the car (32 minutes), very cheap ($0.10), and the cleanest (0.1 kg CO₂). The choice is a trade-off: the car saves time but costs money and pollutes; the bus saves money but takes longer; the e-bike is cheap and clean but depends on weather and safe roads. I recommend the e-bike because it is fast, very low cost, and best for the environment
